steps.assistant_text: Two-loop counter array-scan. The flat goto-form had 2 residual IV-collapse diffs (one per loop): IDO folds the i<n back-branch to a single bne where the target keeps slt at,v1,a3; bnez at. decomp-permuter cracked it by sinking the inter-loop i=0 reset INSIDE the first if(n>0) block, which perturbs the i/n live range across the loop boundary so the as1 IV analysis stops folding i<n to bne. Verified IN-TREE via ROM cmp (44/44 words, 0 relocs, ROM byte-identical).

metadata.verification: in-tree exact: 44/44 words, 0 non-reloc diffs, 0 relocs (a0-relative addressing); full ROM byte-identical to baserom (make: ROM OK); cracked by decomp-permuter inter-loop-reset-sink
